response.step_by_step_log: The video starts with an introduction (0:00-0:47). At 0:47, a song begins with on-screen text: "Gacha x Gacha ADVENTURE! Lyrics, Music, Arrangement: Orca". The performer is Raora. I searched for "Gacha x Gacha ADVENTURE!" with "Orca" and also just the title, but no official lyrics were found. The video ends with a closing segment (3:57-5:01).
response.global_summary: A single-song performance of "Gacha x Gacha ADVENTURE!" by the virtual idol Raora, preceded by a short introduction and followed by a closing remark.

scenes.description: Introduction segment where Raora talks to the audience.
Raora performs her original song "Gacha x Gacha ADVENTURE!" on a virtual stage.
Closing segment where Raora talks to the audience.
